# Anchit Tandon

> Anchit Tandon is a D2C product leader and AI builder. He is AGM, Product Management & D2C Growth at Vahdam India, a backend engineer turned product manager focused on growth funnels, subscriptions, 0-to-1 consumer products, retention systems and AI workflows. Previously Product Manager / Senior PM at Times Internet. This site is an interactive OS-style portfolio plus a suite of live AI tools he built.

## Core

- [Home / Portfolio](https://anchit-tandon.com/): Who Anchit is, his work at Vahdam India, career at Times Internet, and links to every AI side build.
- [AI Video Avatar — Talk to Anchit](https://anchit-tandon.com/agent): A photoreal AI video avatar that answers on camera in his cloned voice (Claude brain + D-ID + TTS cascade).
- [D2C-LifeCycle-OS](https://anchit-tandon.com/d2c-lifecycle-os): Plug-and-play, brand-agnostic AI lifecycle marketing OS — enter a D2C brand and get benchmarks, segments, a campaign calendar, mailers, retention flows and KPIs.
- [JobHunt](https://anchit-tandon.com/jobhunt): A free live AI job-search agent — pulls real openings from public boards with direct apply links and AI-tailored resumes.
- [The How-To Engine](https://anchit-tandon.com/how-to-2): An ADHD-friendly, 3D interactive learning engine that explains any humanly-doable task via a multi-model agentic cascade.

## Lifecycle OS suite

- [Lifecycle OS](https://anchit-tandon.com/lifecycle-os): The umbrella AI-led D2C growth operating system tying the modules below into one loop.
- [Data Analysis](https://anchit-tandon.com/lifecycle-os-analysis): D2C growth analytics workbench — KPIs, signals board, cohort retention, breakdowns, CSV export.
- [Marketing Calendar](https://anchit-tandon.com/lifecycle-os-calendar): 90-day, segment- and festival-aware campaign calendar with a per-slot mailer pipeline.
- [Mailer Studio](https://anchit-tandon.com/lifecycle-os-studio): Turn a brief into on-brand, quality-scored, ready-to-send HTML email variants.
- [Competitive Intelligence](https://anchit-tandon.com/lifecycle-os-intel): SimilarWeb / SEMrush-style peer profiling and benchmark bands.
- [Smart Brain](https://anchit-tandon.com/lifecycle-os-brain): Agentic 90-day planning, cohort orchestration and full-funnel content with a verify/approve loop.
- [Retention Playbook](https://anchit-tandon.com/lifecycle-os-playbook): Library of lifecycle plays — triggers, flows and KPIs by category.
- [Landing Page Studio](https://anchit-tandon.com/lifecycle-os-landing): Generate a conversion-shaped landing page from a brief, with live preview and downloadable HTML.
- [Cohort Builder](https://anchit-tandon.com/lifecycle-os-cohorts): Behavioural cohort definitions with rules, sizes and the recommended play.
- [Ads Studio](https://anchit-tandon.com/lifecycle-os-ads): Ad-copy matrix (headlines × primary text × CTAs) across platforms with benchmark targets.
- [Social Studio](https://anchit-tandon.com/lifecycle-os-social): On-brand per-platform social posts (caption + hashtags).
- [Creative Gallery](https://anchit-tandon.com/lifecycle-os-creative): On-brand creative concepts (ad, banner, social tile, email hero).
- [Growth Audit](https://anchit-tandon.com/lifecycle-os-audit): Lifecycle / funnel audit with prioritised findings and concrete fixes.
- [Frameworks](https://anchit-tandon.com/lifecycle-os-frameworks): AARRR, RFM, JTBD, Hook and Bullseye applied concretely to a subject.
- [Sonic Branding](https://anchit-tandon.com/lifecycle-os-music): Generate a short brand melody plus a sonic-identity brief.
- [Ask the Brand Brain](https://anchit-tandon.com/lifecycle-os-ask): Q&A answering lifecycle and growth questions from generated brand facts.
- [Connectors](https://anchit-tandon.com/lifecycle-os-connectors): Where a store, ESP and analytics would plug in; runs on benchmarks until connected.

## Contact

- Email: anchit.tandon@gmail.com
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/anchit-tandon
